item.title: config/paths.ts still uses process.env.HOME instead of os.homedir()
item.intent: os.homedir() is the single API for user home directory throughout the codebase. No process.env.HOME usage remains after BUG-010.
item.description: src/config/paths.ts lines 42 and 51 use process.env.HOME ?? homedir() — they correctly import and fall back to homedir(), but still unnecessarily check process.env.HOME first. BUG-010 established that os.homedir() is the correct cross-platform API and fixed sanitizer.ts, but paths.ts was not updated. While the current code is safe (homedir() is the fallback), the inconsistency violates the intent of BUG-010. Steps: (1) open src/config/paths.ts; (2) find lines using process.env.HOME ?? homedir(); (3) replace each with homedir() directly; (4) verify homedir import from 'os' is present; (5) run existing config/paths tests to confirm no regression. Scope: two-line change in one file.
